subject: [PATCH 06/11] mm/zsmalloc, zswap: Redirect zswap_entry->objcg to zspage

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the impact of this change on zswap's memory usage and suggested further analysis is needed to ensure it doesn't introduce any regressions.

2026-03-11.patch_summary: This patch redirects the zswap layer to use the obj_cgroup pointer stored in the zspage, eliminating duplicate storage and resulting in a net zero memory footprint change.
